summary: Completed frontend testing of three new features: Trust Distribution Analysis page, Financial Recommendations page, and ChartContainer component. All new features are working correctly. Navigation links in sidebar work properly. The new pages do NOT show Recharts console warnings, confirming ChartContainer is effective. Dashboard still shows 4 pre-existing Recharts warnings from other components.

notes.issue: 4 Recharts console warnings about negative width/height still appear on Dashboard page
notes.note: These are pre-existing warnings from other chart components not wrapped with ChartContainer. The new pages (Trust Distribution, Recommendations) do NOT show these warnings.

passed_tests: Trust Distribution Analysis page (/trust-distributions) loads correctly
Trust Distribution page - Trust Configuration card displays correctly
Trust Distribution page - Beneficiary Tax Impact section shows all 4 beneficiaries
Trust Distribution page - Sliders work and update tax calculations in real-time
Trust Distribution page - Show Details button expands tax bracket breakdown table
Trust Distribution page - Add Beneficiary button adds new beneficiary
Trust Distribution page - Warning message appears when distribution exceeds 100%
Trust Distribution page - Tax Comparison chart renders correctly
Trust Distribution page - Effective Rates by Beneficiary chart renders correctly
Trust Distribution page - Distribution Recommendations section shows dynamic recommendations
Trust Distribution page - No Recharts console warnings
Financial Recommendations page (/recommendations) loads correctly
Financial Recommendations page - Summary metrics (Debt/Asset Ratio, Sharpe Ratio, Diversification, Effective Tax Rate) display correctly
Financial Recommendations page - Portfolio Health Score radar chart renders correctly
Financial Recommendations page - Action Priority Distribution pie chart renders correctly
Financial Recommendations page - Top Recommendations section shows dynamic recommendations
Financial Recommendations page - Tabs (Overview, Recommendations, Metrics) work correctly
Financial Recommendations page - Metrics tab shows Debt Metrics, Risk Metrics, Asset Composition, Tax Efficiency cards
Financial Recommendations page - No Recharts console warnings
Navigation to Recommendations page via sidebar link works
Navigation to Trust Analysis page via sidebar link works
Income Splitting page charts render correctly with ChartContainer wrapper
Income Splitting page - No Recharts console warnings
Dashboard charts render correctly (Asset Allocation, Investment Projection)
action_items: OPTIONAL: Wrap remaining Dashboard chart components with ChartContainer to eliminate pre-existing Recharts warnings
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/components/ChartContainer.jsx - Added requestAnimationFrame and setTimeout delay to improve dimension measurement timing
seed_data_creation: No seed data created - app uses demo data from frontend context
context_for_next_testing_agent: Three new features tested and working: 1) Trust Distribution Analysis page at /trust-distributions with slider-based distribution controls and real-time tax calculations, 2) Financial Recommendations page at /recommendations with dynamic recommendations based on portfolio metrics, 3) ChartContainer component successfully prevents Recharts warnings on new pages. Dashboard still has 4 pre-existing Recharts warnings from other components not wrapped with ChartContainer.

features: Dynamic recommendations based on debt/equity ratio, Sharpe ratio, diversification, tax efficiency

chart_container.note: Successfully prevents Recharts warnings on new pages. Pre-existing warnings on Dashboard are from other components.

navigation.note: Sidebar links to Recommendations and Trust Analysis pages work correctly
